scripts.build: pnpm --filter @electric-ax/agents build && pnpm --filter electric-ax build:desktop && pnpm --filter @electric-ax/agents-server-ui build:desktop && vite build
scripts.dev: pnpm run ensure:electron && concurrently -k -n ui,desktop -c cyan,green "pnpm run dev:ui" "pnpm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dist: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --linux --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.publish:desktop: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:icons && pnpm run rebuild:native && electron-builder --publish always
